crossAgentPatterns.pattern: Heavy Chrome usage combined with Downloads folder overflow
crossAgentPatterns.recommendation: Close unused Chrome tabs and clean out the Downloads folder to recover performance and disk space.

crossAgentPatterns.pattern: 124 GB of reclaimable disk space identified
crossAgentPatterns.recommendation: Run Janitor cleanup to reclaim disk space from temp files, duplicates, and large unused files.

maintenanceWindow.reason: System is typically idle overnight. Auto-cleanup tasks run fastest when disk is not in use.
